reviews.title: the humming sound kills
reviews.positives: set right along the poetic beauty of the Nhật Lệ river, the setting felt incredibly serene. taking an early morning walk by the water was truly a blessing. i would gladly return just to experience this riverside again
reviews.negatives:
i chose this hotel for its riverside location and expected a pleasant view and atmosphere, especially after seeing photos of the large windows and glass walls. however, once in the room i realized the windows were sealed shut. not only was there no way to let in fresh air, but the room also felt damp, with condensation covering the glass surfaces when i checked in.

i am highly sensitive to scents and had noted this on my booking and in advance emails. the hotel kindly confirmed they understood, yet when i arrived late in the evening after a long workday, the room was strongly fragranced, which was unexpected and uncomfortable.

there was also a persistent low humming sound throughout the building, likely from the ventilation system. it created a constant bass-like noise that made rest difficult and left the space feeling subtly stressful. the staff tried to help and moved me through three different rooms, including an upgrade, but the noise appeared to be structural and remained unchanged. after the third move i was too exhausted and tried to sleep with high-grade earplugs, but it was still very difficult to fall and stay asleep.

i would not recommend this property for light sleepers or guests who are particularly sensitive to air quality or scent.

reviews.title: 3 star - not 5
reviews.text: Experience was below standard. They ran electrical and fire tests from 7.30 in the morning on our last day. Good for breakfast was cold and unappealing. I would say they hit 3 star mark - a long way off 5 for sure
reviews.response:

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback with us.

This is certainly not the level of comfort and service we aim to provide, especially for a hotel of our standard.
Your comments have been shared with the relevant teams for review and improvement. We truly value your feedback as it helps us identify areas where we must do better.
We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you again in the future and provide you with a much-improved stay.

Warm regards, 
DOAN HUONG GIANG (Ms) 
EXECUTIVE ASSISTANT MANAGER

reviews.text: I had a great stay, mainly because the staff was excellent and worked hard to accommodate and ensure I had a comfortable stay.  The location is great, the views were great. The downsides are that by western standards the cleanliness of the room, specifically the bathroom could use a scrub or two. Mold in the grout and behind the toiletries. The refillable items look like they are barely ever cleansed. The walls and glass in the shower etc all needs a deep clean. Similarly there are dirt marking on the door panels and walls that could easily be wiped down or scrubbed clean in between stays. The breakfast buffet is meh but convenient, however overpriced if not included in stay.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: The hotel was beautiful. The highlights were the incredible breakfast, fast wifi, heated indoor pool, and outdoor Garbo bar where you could watch the sunset. The shower and bath were great and the aircon worked perfectly and wasn't too loud. The staff at the restaurants, especially the hostess, were so warm and lovely. I had a massage in the spa which was also fantastic.
reviews.negatives: The bed was rock hard, and the pillow were so soft and didn't have much substance to them so my parter got neck pain every morning. We asked if there were firmer pillows we could switch to but this was not possible. The Garbo restaurant was beautiful but the menu was very limited as many of the meals (especially the vegetarian ones) were not available. This is perhaps because the hotel wasn't very busy. Overall the two restaurant menus didn't have many vegetarian options.

reviews.title: A Good Night's Rest
reviews.text: Me and my friend stayed here as a little layover before we headed over to Phong Nha Khe Bang National Park for some cave trekking with Oxalis. It was raining but staff were quick to offer umbrellas for us to borrow. Amenities such as toothbrush, soap, and shampoo were available for us to use. The bed and pillows were very comfy. The city view during this bit of rain was definitely a plus to see out of the window at night. Overall a really good stay with a very awesome breakfast. It's also located next to a small mall, so you can get some last minute items if needed. One note would probably be there was a sewage-y smell that permeated the hallway, but never got into our rooms (guessing there were plumbing issues that were being fixed in one of the rooms). It lasted for maybe an hour or two because when I exited to leave my room it was all gone. So that was an awesome response by staff given the circumstances and they were able to resolve whatever issue caused it.

reviews.title: Wouldn’t have changed a thing.
reviews.positives: The bed was a dream. Firm and supportive pillows, weighted blanket, and soft sheets. The staff went above and beyond to help make my birthday weekend special. They even helped my boyfriend arrange a cake from a nearby shop. The breakfast was absolutely amazing! A full spread of pastries, fruit, and lunch items. It included omelette and pho stations, and freshly griddled pancakes and waffles. And to top it off, the hotel offers 24-hour room service. Having the flexibility to order a late night snack proved invaluable to our stay. We were so happy we decided to stay out of Phòng Nha and in Dong Hoi instead. The hour long trip to see the caves was well worth our stay at this luxurious hotel.

reviews.title: Beautiful hotel
reviews.text: The hotel is definitely a 5 star hotel.  It is beautiful with great facility options (pool, gym, spa, restaurant).  The room was very spacious and all facilities are in good condition and clean.  Staff are friendly.  The large breakfast buffet has many options to choose from, plus an egg station and pho station.  If you want your room made up, you do need to place the sign on the door, otherwise the cleaning service will bypass your room.  For us, the location wasn't ideal.  It was a pretty quiet, less busy area.

reviews.text:
This hotel was a lovely delight after 2 long days of travel. The foyer and rooms are spacious and clean. Tastefully decorated. Beautiful views of the area the bed was very large and comfortable.  The bathrooms were also fantastic. My only wish was for hotter water for a lovely soak in the beautiful tub.
The pool was clean and nice. It was generally pretty busy with locals practicing their swimming, but still a nice place to relax even when the weather is not ideal. Very kind of the staff to allow use of the pool prior to our room being ready. 
The fitness area was also a nice treat. Clean, well maintained and a good selection of equipment for a workout. 
My only wish is for the outside of the windows to be cleaned for better views, but I appreciate that is probably a never-ending task and a nice to have rather than a necessity. 
We would definitely stay here again.

Adjacent to the hotel is a riverside park and some small streets offering authentic local specialties. To the left of the hotel is a department store. I would still rate it 9.9/10.

The pool is nice. The spa is clean and decent.

I walked about a mile to view Ho Chi Minh statue complex. I saw many joggers there.
Short overnight stay but worth the splurge. Any service issues someone came right away to my door.

Les employés font réellement tout leur possible pour aider les clients. La coordination de mon départ matinal a été parfaite, et ils ont accepté un check-in à 11 h sans frais supplémentaires.
reviews.negatives: Le restaurant n'est pas à la hauteur pour un endroit de ce standing. Quand j'ai demandé du fromage en plus pour des pâtes moyennes, j'ai attendu une éternité : j'avais presque fini mon plat quand la serveuse est arrivée, toute désolée et en courant. Enfin, les fenêtres de la chambre étaient sales, même si c'est difficile à nettoyer dans une tour aussi élevée, ce qui gâchait un peu la vue, mais pas l'expérience globale.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Fantastique !
Nous avons adoré cet hôtel qui a tout pour plaire. L'accueil est très sympa et charmant. La chambre Deluxe est magnifique, spacieuse, lumineuse, avec douche et baignoire (eau chaude et jet parfaits), 3 coussins et un matelas très confortables. Une grande lampe de chevet. Le spa est très élégant et très bien conçu avec des filles adorables. Les prix sont très attractifs et nous avons beaucoup apprécié le massage et le soin visage. La piscine est extraordinaire !! La salle de sport est très classe et très bien équipée. Dans tous les services l'accueil a été irréprochable. Nous n'avons pas testé le petit dej. Vous pouvez utiliser Grab pour aller au parc national Phong Nah Ke Bang.

reviews.title: Attentive staff, excellent location

Thank you for taking the time to write this wonderful review. We are delighted you had an enjoyable stay with us. It is nice to read you particularly enjoyed our food, fruits and our facilities.

We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back very soon.

With our kindest regards from beautiful Vinpearl Hotel Quang Binh, 

Phan Le Thi Kim Ngan
General Manager

reviews.title: A hotel worth choosing when staying in Quang Binh.
reviews.text: The Vinpearl hotel system may not be as pristine as the 5-star hotels of global corporations, but the location of the hotel is the best in the city. My room was the cheapest in the hotel, not with a river view, but the view was still stunning. The hotel has a choco cake served in a glass jar that is very delicious. I arrived during a storm, so I encountered heavy rain, but sitting in the lobby waiting to check in while drinking tea and enjoying that cake was very nice. Now thinking about it makes me crave it, and I don’t know when I will get to eat it again.

reviews.title: Hotel mit internationalem Standard und schöner Aussicht
reviews.positives: Das Hotel besitzt internationalen Standard und ist in gutem Zustand; die Zimmer sind sehr geräumig und schön eingerichtet. Wir hatten zwei Zimmer mit Verbindungstür und City-Blick. Da wir in einem der oberen Stockwerke waren, hatten wir eine sehr schöne Aussicht über die Stadt. Das Frühstück war sehr umfangreich und das Personal sehr hilfreich. Z. B. gibt es in Đồng Hới so kleine Golf-Carts, die City-Touren anbieten. Die Dame von der Rezeption hat uns erklärt was es damit auf sich hat und angeboten eins für uns zu buchen.
reviews.negatives: Es gibt eigentlich eine schöne Außenbar, die aber irgendwie nicht in Betrieb ist oder nicht genutzt wird. Unsere Getränke (es gab leider die Hälfte der Karte nicht) wurden dann glaube ich in der Küche zubereitet. Das Personal hat sich wirklich sehr bemüht und alles war ok, aber vielleicht sollte man versuchen die Bar wieder ein bisschen mehr zu beleben.

reviews.title: Worth the price of admission
reviews.text:
Our room on the 16th floor facing the bay was spectacular, offering such a unique view of the serene water passage where the fishing boats return daytime, the beautiful bridge and city lights at night, and also of the Bac Bo Bay beyond.

The hotel staffs were extremely helpful from the moment we step into the lobby, each and every single time. They answered all our questions and even went above and beyond in helping us get a refund from our airline. We only wished they had bicycles included or even for rent as the closet bicycle rental shop was 1.5km away.

All in all, we would definitely consider staying here again in future travels to Dong Hoi.

reviews.positives: Vị trí tốt
reviews.negatives: Nhân viên nghiệp vụ rất kém. Bộ phận dọn phòng không chịu dọn phòng cho khách dù đã 2h chiều, khi khách nhắc thì kêu bận, hứa chiều muộn sẽ dọn, sau đó quên luôn không dọn. Nhân viên nhà ăn không chịu kiểm tra trước, vào tận bàn ăn đòi khách trả tiền ăn sáng trong khi khách đã trả trước rồi. Bàn ăn sáng kiểu bao cấp hình tròn cho 12 người ăn, trông rất lôi thôi. Không có nhân viên hướng dẫn vào bàn trống, khách phải đi từng bàn hỏi xem còn chỗ trống nào để ngồi không

reviews.title: Very detailed service.
reviews.text: The breakfast was prepared very carefully. For example, the steamed sticky rice with mung beans was cooked with steam, so it was very delicious (most hotels that serve sticky rice cook it like glutinous rice, which cannot compare to the sticky rice here), the hot rice rolls were rolled for customers to eat right away, and the crispy dough sticks were fried on the spot to eat with the hot noodle soup... I would rate the breakfast a perfect 10.
